name: Oxytocin
description: Endogenous peptide homonụ. Uterotonic nke mbụ maka mgbochi na ọgwụgwọ nke ọbara ọgbụgba (PPH). Na-ebute mkpụkọ uterine ma belata mfu ọbara mgbe a mụsịrị ya. Enyere mgbe a mụsịrị placental.
indications: Mgbochi nke ọbara ọgbụgba mgbe ọmụmụ (na-emekarị mgbe a mụsịrị nwa)
Ọgwụgwọ ọbara ọgbụgba mgbe ime nwa (uterine atony)
Mmalite nke ọrụ (naanị ntọala a na-achịkwa)
dose: Mgbochi PPH: nkeji 10 IM ozugbo nnyefe placental (ụzọ ubi ọkacha mmasị). Ọgwụgwọ PPH: nkeji 10-40 na 1L IV, tinye na 40-80 mU / min. Ọ bụrụ na IV adịghị: 10 nkeji IM.
window: Nye mgbe a mụsịrị placenta -- inye tupu placenta ebupụta nwere ike ọnyà placenta.
contraindications: Tupu nnyefe placental (nwere ike ijide placenta)
Ahụhụ nwa ebu n'afọ na-enweghị isi
warnings: ENYERE MGBE E KWASỊTA PLACETA -- ọnyà placenta bụ ihe mgbagwoju anya na-eyi ndụ egwu.
IV bolus nwere ike ịkpata nnukwu hypotension na obi arrhythmia --mgbe niile na-atụgharị ma na-enye nwayọọ nwayọọ.
Mmetụta antidiuretic nwere nnukwu mpịakọta - nyochaa maka hyponatremia.

pediatric.dose: N/A -- naanị iji nwa eme ihe.

obstetric.note: Uterotonic nke mbụ. Ọ bụrụ na atony uterine azaghị, tụlee misoprostol, tranexamic acid (TXA), mkpakọ uterine bimanual, na ngwa ngwa MEDEVAC.

source: JTS CPG: Obstetric Emergencies / WHO PPH Guidelines
